headline: NPS from +15 to +45 at CBA. CANSTAR Outstanding Value five consecutive years.
evidence: NPS from +15 to +45 at CBA, +25 to +44 at Westpac. CANSTAR Outstanding Value five consecutive years. Novel rating factor reduced premiums 10%, improved loss ratio 1%, no adverse rating on lower economic groups. Significant customer remediations refunded proactively at CBA. Proactive outreach to entitled customers at Westpac.
